title: Customizable
description: Ever wanted to use trims without getting it yourself?
body:
# Description:
Ever wanted to use all armor trims without working for it?

This datapack makes it that running the ```/trigger Customize``` command will teleport you to a custom dimension and in there will be 2 chest and a smithing table allowing you to grab whatever materials/shards and trims from the chest.

Once your done doing your trimming you can simply run the ```/trigger Customize``` again to teleport back.

If you find any issues regarding the teleportation mechanic please join the [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/YjUEXtS6sH) and make a Bug Report.
